# results { #forensicface.results }

`results`

Result containers and assembly helpers.

## Classes

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [AlignedFace](#forensicface.results.AlignedFace) | Internal normalized representation of an aligned face. |
| [FaceResult](#forensicface.results.FaceResult) | Face processing result with both mapping and attribute access. |

### AlignedFace { #forensicface.results.AlignedFace }

```python
results.AlignedFace(
    aligned_face,
    bbox,
    keypoints,
    aligned_keypoints,
    det_score,
    gender=None,
    age=None,
    pose=None,
)
```

Internal normalized representation of an aligned face.

``aligned_face`` is RGB because public ``FaceResult`` outputs expose aligned
faces in RGB order. Recognition helpers may still convert it to BGR at the
ONNX boundary.

### FaceResult { #forensicface.results.FaceResult }

```python
results.FaceResult()
```

Face processing result with both mapping and attribute access.

Existing code can keep using ``ret["bbox"]`` and ``isinstance(ret, dict)``;
new code can use ``ret.bbox`` for keys that do not collide with dict
methods such as ``keys`` or ``items``.

## Functions

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [build_embedding_result](#forensicface.results.build_embedding_result) | Build a result for recognition-only APIs that receive aligned faces. |

### build_embedding_result { #forensicface.results.build_embedding_result }

```python
results.build_embedding_result(
    embeddings,
    fiqa_score,
    models,
    extended,
    concat_embeddings,
    index=None,
)
```

Build a result for recognition-only APIs that receive aligned faces.
